markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content production, AI performance, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **AI Performance Surging:** Sunbit is now the \#2 brand in AI visibility (after CareCredit) and ranks in the top 3 for 70% of relevant prompts. Visibility for two key queries hit 100% in the last 24 hours.
  - [**Production Backlog:** A significant backlog persists (22 articles in production, 42 in review), but the new AI image generation feature is now active and producing relevant options for review.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Process Optimization:** A new publishing-focused view was created to bypass a platform UX bug. The team will propose moving to biweekly meetings to focus on strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Upcoming Proposals:** GrowthX will present Jason with a package upgrade proposal, the Sunbit.ai proposal, and discuss the renewal next week.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Backlog

  - [**Backlog Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [In Production: 22 articles](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [In Review: 42 articles](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Publishing Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [**Problem:** A platform UX bug prevents bulk updates and creates confusion for new users invited to a workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX created a custom publishing view to streamline Angel's workflow. A dev ticket has been submitted to fix the core bug.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**AI Image Generation:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [The new feature is active and generating relevant image options for articles (e.g., for "Reducing service advisor turnover...").](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [These options are currently paused for human review in the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

### AI Performance & Strategy

  - [**Overall Growth:** A 3-month analysis shows steady growth in both total and engaged sessions for GrowthX-produced content.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Competitive Positioning:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - **Visibility:** \#2 brand mentioned in AI prompts, after CareCredit.
      - [**Ranking:** Ranks in the top 3 for 70% of relevant AI responses.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [**Sentiment:** Predominantly positive.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [**Recent Surge in Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [Visibility for two key, relevant queries reached 100% in the last 24 hours (up from \~80% yesterday).](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [**Note:** AI performance data is highly volatile; metrics can change daily.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [**Platform-Specific Behavior:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [**Perplexity:** Cites frequently.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [**Claude:** Cites less frequently.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [**Google AI:** Correlates with SEO performance; strong SEO → higher visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**ChatGPT:** Most volatile, with inconsistent citation behavior.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [**"Best Of" Lists:** Acknowledged as a potential risk for long-term AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [**Current Approach:** Sunbit's content mix is balanced, avoiding over-reliance on these lists.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [**Goal:** Use content to build AI associations with competitors (CareCredit, Klarna) and relevant topics (ADA).](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)

### Process & Proposals

  - [**Meeting Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Move to biweekly meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Allows for deeper strategic discussion, with daily coordination handled via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [**Publishing Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [GrowthX offered to assist with publishing, including staging content for a one-click approval.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [**Upcoming Proposals for Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
      - [Package upgrade proposal](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
      - [Sunbit.ai proposal](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
      - [Renewal discussion](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Angel:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Propose biweekly meetings to Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [Discuss GrowthX's publishing support offer with Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
      - [Follow up with Jason next week on the renewal, package upgrade, and Sunbit.ai proposals.](https://fathom.video/share/gF7TLPWu4H26_2_nbK9zqfhS_3VK7y3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
